title: ANC - changes are present after restarting the app
scenario: ANC setting does not persist after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Set ANC to a specific mode (e.g., High ANC, Low ANC, or Adaptive ANC).
5. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app and wait for the device to reconnect.
7. Navigate again to Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC setting should remain at the value selected in step 4 (e.g., High ANC, Low ANC, or Adaptive ANC).
